changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: update audit_record set audit_event = jsonb_set( audit_event, '{definitionId}', concat( '{"name":"', audit_event->'definitionId'->>'name', '","caseDefinitionId":{"key":"', audit_event->'definitionId'->>'name', '","versionTag":"0.', audit_event->'definitionId'->>'version', '.0-migrated"}}' )::jsonb, true ) where audit_event->'definitionId'->>'version' is not null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: update audit_record set audit_event = JSON_SET( audit_event, '$.definitionId.name', JSON_EXTRACT(audit_event, '$.definitionId.name'), '$.definitionId.caseDefinitionId.key', JSON_EXTRACT(audit_event, '$.definitionId.name'), '$.definitionId.caseDefinitionId.version', concat('0.', JSON_EXTRACT(audit_event, '$.definitionId.version'), '.0-migrated') ) where JSON_EXTRACT(audit_event, '$.definitionId.version') is not null
